$Comment: Boss-capstone role template for the corrupted-Kweebec Warden. Cloned from Template_KweebecNightmare_Blight (the proven hostile Kweebec spear AI that already chases relentlessly in this arena, with huge sight/alerted/hearing ranges and the de-leashed pursuit), adapted for a multi-phase BOSS by raising MaxHealth/MaxSpeed and enlarging the model. The boss FIGHTS via the inherited Razorleaf instruction tree below (Target_Adjusted_Attack_Melee + Intelligent_Chase), exactly like the Blight - NO CombatActionEvaluator. The Goblin_Duke CAE pattern (UseCombatActionEvaluator + a _CombatConfig top-level field) is NOT supported on this Kweebec-Razorleaf-derived role builder: those keys parse as 'Unknown JSON attribute' and REJECT the whole Abstract builder, which then fails every phase Variant that References it (the boss could not spawn). They were removed; the CAE_KweebecNightmare_Warden_Phase_* balancing assets are now unreferenced. The three phase Variants (KweebecNightmare_Warden / _Phase2 / _Phase3) differ by MaxHealth, MaxSpeed, and Burn only. Phase SWAPS are driven from Java (boss/BossController) on HP thresholds. Burn is a PARAMETER (not a top-level attribute): the Burn instruction block reads it via Enabled:{Compute:Burn}, so the Phase-3 Variant flipping Burn=true wreathes it in fire (mirrors the native Goblin_Duke_Phase_3 Burn-param pattern).

Appearance.Description: Model to be used (the large dark corrupted Warden reskin)

AlertedRange.Description: A range within which the player can be seen/sensed when the NPC is alerted to their presence

WatchRange.Description: The range at which the Warden will look at nearby (non-hostile) targets

DropList.Description: Drop Items (boss drops are granted via the round reward pipeline, not a vanilla drop list)

MaxSpeed.Description: Maximum walking speed (boss is deliberate; the corruption ramp + enrage layer on top of this)

AttackSequence.Description: The attack sequence to use in combat

AttackDistance.Description: The distance at which an NPC will execute attacks

MotionComponent.Description: The component to use for motion

CombatRelativeTurnSpeed.Description: Modifier that decides turn speed difference in combat

MaxHealth.Description: Max health for the Warden (per-phase Variant overrides this: 600 / 450 / 300)

Burn.Description: Whether the Warden is wreathed in fire (the Phase 3 enrage signal; consumed by the Burn instruction's Enabled compute, NOT a top-level role attribute)

IsMemory.Description: Defines if the NPC is a memory

MemoriesCategory.Description: Defines the category of the memory

MemoriesNameOverride.Description: Overrides the memory name if set

NameTranslationKey.Description: Translation key for NPC name display

$Comment_Melee: Heavy boss spear hit: same override pattern as the Blight (Replaces NPC_Attack_Melee_Damage's calculator + knockback) but tuned harder for a capstone. Absolute Physical so the boss is dangerous regardless of armor; a strong launch keeps the survivors honest.

Instructions.$Comment: Persistent Burn while the Phase-3 Variant flips Burn=true (mirrors Goblin_Duke_Phase_3_Fast). A no-op for Phases 1/2 (Burn=false disables the sensor).
Relentless boss chase: no soft leash, pursues the nearest survivor across the bounded arena (same intent as the Blight).

Alerted-state handler. REQUIRED: the Search component above exports the Alerted state in its _ExportStates, and the role builder REJECTS the whole template if a set state has no matching handler (the 'State setter ... without accompanying state/setter: Alerted' validation failure that kept the Warden from registering - every phase Variant then failed as 'unknown builder', so the boss never spawned and the gate opened with no Warden). The Warden has no investigate/converge phase (unlike the Blight it was cloned from): anything sensed escalates straight to Attack, its relentless-boss design with 512 sight/hearing.
